positive: A whimsical, stylized graphic illustration of a smiling crescent moon nestled among abstract constellations and playful nebula clouds. The central element should be a minimalist, thick-lined silhouette of a stylized owl sitting on the moon. Incorporate geometric star clusters, stylized constellations using glowing, bioluminescent lines (electric blue, gold, deep purple), and soft gradient nebula wash in the background. Style: Highly detailed, modern kawaii illustration mixed with Art Nouveau organic lines. Composition: Perfect central layout, ensuring high contrast and clean edges against a dark indigo midnight sky. Lighting: Subtle, diffused celestial glow emanating from the nebula and stars. Color Palette: Deep indigo, midnight black, sapphire blue, gold foil accents, and ethereal purple.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, messy, poor quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, writing, signature
